logging.description: Configuration for logging AI activity. Setting to 'true' enables logging. Other options control the log level, file location, and the format of log messages. Consider adjusting the `level` to `DEBUG` for detailed troubleshooting, but be mindful of log file size.

model_settings.note: Adjust temperature to control the randomness of generated text. Lower values (e.g., 0.2) result in more deterministic outputs, while higher values (e.g., 1.0) introduce more creativity.  The `top_p` parameter controls the cumulative probability mass of tokens considered for generation. Setting this to 1.0 means all tokens are considered. `max_tokens` limits the length of generated output.  `prompt_prefix` helps define the expected start of user prompts. `stop_sequences` prevent the model from continuing generation beyond specified tokens.
